deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate announcements 0007 --noinput && python manage.py migrate announcements 0008 --fake --noinput && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py shell -c "from django.core.cache import cache; cache.delete('universities'); cache.delete('university_list'); cache.clear()" && python manage.py loaddata features/universities/fixtures/universities.json || true && python manage.py loaddata features/announcements/fixtures/categories.json || true && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && daphne -b 0.0.0.0 -p $PORT config.asgi:application
